debug_info.goal:
μ ν : Measure ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsProbabilityMeasure μ
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure ν
n : ℕ
i j : Fin n
h : i < j
⊢ HasLaw (fun ω => wignerMatrixMap n ω i j) μ (WignerMeasure μ ν n)

failed_attempts:
simp [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', h, ne_of_lt h]
  rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]
  · intro p; unfold wignerMeasureDist; split_ifs <;> assumption

rw [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap']
  simp [wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, ne_of_lt h]
  rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]
  · intro p; simp [wignerMeasureDist]; split <;> assumption

haveI : ∀ p, IsProbabilityMeasure (wignerMeasureDist μ ν n p) :=
    fun p ↦ by dsimp [wignerMeasureDist]; split_ifs <;> assumption
  simp [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', h, h.ne, WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi, wignerMeasureDist]

simp [HasLaw, wignerMatrixMap, wignerMatrixMap', wignerMatrixEntryFunction, h, ne_of_lt h]
  rw [WignerMeasure, Measure.map_eval_pi]
  · simp [wignerMeasureDist, ne_of_lt h]
  · intro p; rw [wignerMeasureDist]; split <;> infer_instance
